title: 独家 | 智谱 CEO唐杰发内部信：「GLM 时刻」和万亿俱乐部之后，什么是更重要的事
content: Zhipu AI founder Tang Jie issued an internal letter titled "The Giant Wave Has Arrived" on July 11, 2026, after the company's market value grew 10x and joined the "trillion HKD club." Following its successful bet on AI coding capabilities, Zhipu now aims at three strategic frontiers: long-horizon task capabilities, fully autonomous agent systems, and self-evolving AI. The "Touch High" initiative will strategically invest in these areas over two years, prioritizing AGI advancement over short-term commercialization, alongside robust safety governance and open-source commitments through models like GLM-5.2.

title: 为了“AI iPhone”，苹果正式起诉OpenAI
content: Apple sued OpenAI on July 10, alleging systematic theft of trade secrets through poaching former employees. The lawsuit names chief hardware officer Tang Tan, a former Apple Watch executive, and cites ex-engineer Chang Liu, who retained access to Apple's cloud storage through an unreturned laptop post-departure. Apple claims over 400 former employees now work at OpenAI. The lawsuit adds risk to OpenAI's anticipated IPO and signals escalating conflict between the companies, whose 2024 iOS integration partnership had already soured over privacy concerns and revenue disputes.

title: 算力过剩是个伪命题
content: The claim of "AI compute overcapacity" is misleading. While Meta and SpaceX sell surplus capacity due to their own mismatches between infrastructure and product readiness, the industry faces actual compute shortage. Anthropic has locked in over 11.7GW of future capacity through deals with Amazon, Google, Microsoft, and others, yet still restricts user access because demand far outpaces supply. Revenue grew from $9 billion to over $30 billion annually, with usage growth hitting 80x. True bottlenecks are power, transformers, and data center delivery timelines stretching to 2028—not excess chips, but inability to deploy them.

title: 为什么中国人这么喜欢哈兰德？
content: Chinese internet users embrace Norwegian footballer Erling Haaland because of his rare combination of elite athletic dominance and meme-friendly personality. His on-field power—scoring 7 goals in his first World Cup, reaching 300 career goals faster than Messi or Ronaldo—gives him credibility. Off-field, his awkward expressions, "stealing water" antics, and willingness to play along with Chinese internet jokes (adopting the nickname "Haobao," filming videos responding to fan requests, posting in Chinese) make him endlessly remixable. His team strategically cultivated this through early Douyin presence and brand partnerships with Midea and Wanglaoji that leaned into his反差人设 (contrasting persona). Ultimately, Haaland succeeds in China because fans actively rewrite him as their own cultural creation rather than consuming a polished celebrity image.

title: 【读书】【历史篇】印度简史：统而不一，分而不裂(1) | 原文
content: India's 5,000-year history, based on John Keay's "India: A History," differs from China's record-keeping tradition. Indian civilization prioritized spiritual over political documentation, leaving scarce early historical records until the 13th century Muslim introduction of chronicles. The narrative begins with the Harappan civilization (3000–1700 BCE), reconstructed largely through archaeology due to limited written sources, with dating formally starting only in 78 CE.

SK Hynix debuted on Nasdaq with a $26.5 billion IPO, surpassing Alibaba's record for overseas companies. Shares rose 13% on day one, valuing the company above $1.2 trillion. The offering reflects Wall Street's vote on AI infrastructure demand, with 7x oversubscription driven by concerns about memory scarcity and sustainable AI demand. SK Hynix dominates global HBM with over 56% market share. Its Q1 FY26 revenue surged nearly 200% with 72% profit margins, exceeding both TSMC and Nvidia. Customers are signing long-term supply agreements through 2028 due to supply uncertainty. The company is exploring "Memory as a Service" to shift toward recurring revenue. The US listing aims to reduce Korea's liquidity discount and attract passive index fund investment, though ADR-share arbitrage friction may cause short-term volatility.

title: 世界杯“最疯狂”的生意，一年暴涨300倍
content: Trading cards have surged during the 2022 World Cup, with one Messi card jumping from 50,000 to 15.2 million yuan in a year. Originating as 19th-century cigarette premiums, the market now thrives on manufactured scarcity: limited editions, autographs, jersey patches, and third-party grading systems fuel speculation. Players trade in stores or via livestream "unboxing," chasing rookie cards of emerging stars—essentially betting on future career narratives. The PWCC 500 index rose 855% from 2008–2022, followed by a crash. Modern collectibles like blind boxes and "goods economy" products replicate this same psychology of scarcity, identity, and imagined value.

title: 36氪首发 | 三个月融三轮，上交大00后博士让具身智能仿生扑翼机器人理解并驾驭流体
content: Yingkan Zhiyi, a Shenzhen-based startup founded in March 2025 by Shanghai Jiao Tong University PhD student Chen Hao, has raised tens of millions of yuan in Series A funding—its third round in three months. The company develops embodied-intelligence ornithopters, or flapping-wing robots, distinguished by its self-developed fluid simulation engine Vortrix. Rather than fighting air like rotor drones, its robots learn to harness airflow through millions of reinforcement-learning iterations in simulation before real-world deployment. Its first consumer product, Eagle X, has undergone 3,000+ flight hours and will launch on Kickstarter in Q3 2025. A second industrial-grade product with ~15 degrees of freedom aims to actively manipulate rather than passively ride currents.

title: 2026创业风向变了，市场不再为“看起来很未来”买单
content: By mid-2026, venture capital has shifted decisively from hype to measurable results. Startups must embed AI into specific workflows, reduce costs, and prove compliance. Key growth areas include applied AI for business processes, cybersecurity, defense tech, robotics, climate solutions with hard metrics, and fintech infrastructure. Small teams can compete using no-code tools and focused customer targeting. Success requires solving urgent problems with existing budgets, maintaining lean operations, and building trust into product design from the start.

title: OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.6 系列模型，Codex 与 ChatGPT 合二为一
content: On July 9, OpenAI released the GPT-5.6 model series: flagship Sol (with Ultra mode coordinating 4 AI agents), balanced Terra, and low-cost Luna. The models reduce inference costs and response times while improving performance. OpenAI also launched a unified desktop app integrating Codex and ChatGPT, with Chat, Work, and Codex modules covering information queries, knowledge work, and software development. Existing ChatGPT desktop users can upgrade; the old version becomes ChatGPT Classic.

title: 我国首次实现大型火箭一级回收
content: China's new-generation Long March 10B rocket successfully completed its maiden flight on July 10, delivering a payload to orbit. Its core stage was recovered using a net system on a sea platform 430 km from the launch site, marking the world's first net-based recovery of a large rocket booster. This makes China the second country after the U.S. to achieve large liquid rocket first-stage recovery. The net system saves payload capacity by transferring landing gear weight to the platform. The success advances China's 2030 crewed lunar landing goals and supports low-orbit satellite constellation deployment needs.

title: 消息称腾讯考虑入股 Manus，或成为其第一大股东
content: Tencent is in talks to acquire AI startup Manus for $2 billion, which would make it the largest shareholder. Manus, launched in March 2025 by Butterfly Effect, moved to Singapore in June and cut its China team after receiving US investment. A previous foreign acquisition attempt was blocked by Chinese authorities. Manus's three founders are also considering raising about $1 billion to buy back the company. No party has commented publicly.

title: MiniMax 闫俊杰：不再领取薪酬，个人拿出 5% 公司股份用于团队激励和开源支持
content: MiniMax CEO Yan Junjie announced he will forgo his salary until the company achieves AGI. He pledged 4% of his personal shares for employee incentives over four years and 1% for an open-source community fund. The announcement came in a company-wide letter addressing market volatility, with Yan emphasizing MiniMax's long-term direction remains unchanged.

title: 全球首次用宇树机器人做手术，中国 00 后博士登 Nature
content: A 00s-born Chinese PhD student led a Nature-published study demonstrating the first humanoid robot surgery on live subjects. The team used a Unitree G1 robot to perform laparoscopic gallbladder removal on two pigs via remote control. The approach aims to reduce costs and equipment limitations of traditional surgical robots, though challenges remain: curved motion errors, near-critical latency, insufficient reach, repeated calibration needs, inadequate sterility, and limited range and strength.

title: SK 海力士美股正式上市 总市值超出美光近 2000 亿美元
content: SK Hynix's ADR debuted on U.S. markets, surging 17.29% to $174.76 per share and reaching a market capitalization of $1.27 trillion. This valuation exceeds Micron Technology's by nearly $200 billion; Micron's shares fell 2.25% to $969.30, with a market cap of $1.09 trillion. The successful listing followed heavy oversubscription of the company's U.S. IPO and a period of strong stock performance that had already pushed its valuation past $1 trillion.
